name: golang-github-eapache-go-xerial-snappy-dev
title: golang-github-eapache-go-xerial-snappy-dev
summary: Xerial-compatible Snappy framing support for Go
description:
Xerial-compatible Snappy framing support for Go
The package wraps Go's built-in Snappy package (github.com/golang/snappy)
adding support for a Xerial compatible framing format.
.
The package was extracted from Shopify's sarama Kafka client.
